quality_gates.description: Quality gates are automated checks that the agent MUST execute before marking a task as completed. Only gates matching the project's tech_stack (from harness-config.yaml) are executed.

pre_commit.description: All new and modified Python code must have test coverage >= 80%.
pre_commit.error_message: Test coverage is below 80%. Cannot proceed until coverage is increased.

pre_commit.description: Python code must pass the Ruff linter with zero errors.
pre_commit.error_message: Ruff linter found errors. Fix all linting issues before proceeding.

pre_commit.description: Python code should pass type checking with mypy.
pre_commit.error_message: mypy found type errors. Review and fix type annotations.

pre_commit.description: C code must compile with all warnings treated as errors.
pre_commit.error_message: C code has compilation warnings/errors. Fix all issues before proceeding.
pre_commit.notes: Use 'command_alt' for ESP-IDF projects. Replace {source_files} with actual file paths.

pre_commit.description: C code must pass static analysis with cppcheck.
pre_commit.error_message: cppcheck found potential issues. Review and address them.

pre_commit.description: VHDL code must compile without errors.
pre_commit.error_message: VHDL code has compilation errors. Fix all syntax and semantic issues.
VHDL simulation failed. Check testbench and design.

pre_commit.description: Verilog code must compile without errors.
pre_commit.error_message: Verilog code has compilation errors. Fix all issues.
Verilog simulation failed. Check testbench and design.

pre_commit.description: LaTeX documents must compile without errors.
pre_commit.error_message: LaTeX compilation failed. Fix all errors in the document.

pre_commit.description: MATLAB scripts must pass syntax check.
pre_commit.error_message: MATLAB code has syntax or style warnings.
pre_commit.notes: Requires MATLAB to be installed and in PATH. This gate is optional if MATLAB CLI is not available.

pre_commit.description: Mathematica notebooks must pass syntax verification.
pre_commit.notes: Requires WolframScript to be installed. This gate is optional if WolframScript is not available.

pre_merge.description: The implementation plan (plan.md) must have been reviewed and approved by a human.
pre_merge.error_message: The plan has not been approved. Cannot merge without human approval.

pre_merge.description: All tasks in the task breakdown must be marked as completed.
pre_merge.error_message: Not all tasks are completed. Review the task breakdown.

pre_merge.description: The decision log must have been updated with any design decisions made during implementation.
pre_merge.error_message: Decision log may be outdated. Ensure all decisions are recorded.

gate_execution_rules.language_matching: Only execute gates where the 'language' field matches an entry in the project's 'environment.tech_stack' from harness-config.yaml, or where 'language' is 'all'.
gate_execution_rules.command_substitution: Replace placeholders in curly braces ({source_files}, {project}, etc.) with actual values from the project context.
gate_execution_rules.alt_commands: If 'command' fails because the tool is not installed, try 'command_alt' if available.
gate_execution_rules.mandatory_vs_optional: Mandatory gates (mandatory: true) BLOCK task completion on failure. Optional gates (mandatory: false) produce warnings only.
gate_execution_rules.retry_behavior: If a mandatory gate fails, the agent retries the fix-and-check cycle up to max_retries times. After that, it MUST pause and request human guidance.
